_comment: STARTER TEMPLATE for ~/.octave/source_cards/<workspace_slug>/<campaign_slug>.json. Step 2G writes this file with empty headlines_by_variant; Step 3C fills it in after creative generation. The resonance loop's Path A reads this file to map BigQuery performance back to derivation chains. The _example field below is reference-only — the loop never reads it.

campaign_metadata.platform: Google Search | Google Display | Meta | LinkedIn
campaign_metadata.objective: Lead Generation | Brand Awareness | Competitive Displacement | Product Launch
campaign_metadata.campaign_angle: The angle from Step 0, in one sentence

_example._comment: Reference-only example showing the canonical structure. The loop never reads this field.

campaign_metadata.campaign_name: Compliance Automation — VP Engineering Q1 Push
campaign_metadata.campaign_angle: Acme automates the manual audit prep workflow that VP Engineering teams currently do by hand, turning weeks into hours

raw_prospect_language: we spend three weeks every quarter just preparing for the audit
the audit prep process is killing my team
I have engineers doing compliance copy-paste work
fields.emotional_core: Frustration that highly-paid engineers are spending weeks on rote compliance work that should be automated
fields.specific_dysfunction: Manual audit prep — gathering evidence, formatting it, cross-referencing controls — done by hand every quarter
fields.headline_derivation: Prospect said 'three weeks every quarter just for the audit' → emotional core is wasted engineering time → dysfunction is manual audit prep → headline candidate: 'Still Prepping Audits By Hand?'

fields.best_claim: Audit prep cycles cut from 3 weeks to 2 days

pain-focused: Manual Audit Prep Is Killing You
Your engineers spend weeks every quarter on manual audit prep. Acme automates the entire workflow.
Stop wasting engineering time on compliance copy-paste. Get audit-ready in days, not weeks.
outcome-focused: A FinServ engineering team cut audit prep from 3 weeks to 2 days with Acme. Same controls, same evidence, automated.
Stop letting compliance eat your engineering quarter. Book a demo today.
